headline: Is CenterPoint Energy (CNP ) Among the Best Energy Stocks Capitalizing on the Data Center Boom?
summary: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE:CNP) is one of the 10 Best Energy Stocks Capitalizing on the Data Center Boom. Based on 20 analyst ratings compiled by CNN, 50% rated the stock Hold, while 45% rated it Buy. As of June 9, the stock has an average price target of $47, representing 10.88% upside from the current […]
